attacking_style: Insufficient data to determine personal attacking style. Observations show breakaway and domestique roles rather than personal winning efforts.
team_tactics: Deployed in service of team leader Sagan - takes breakaway duties for intermediate sprint points and performs positioning/pacing work to preserve leader's energy.
terrain_preference: Appears on cobbled Monuments and sprint stages, suggesting versatility in classics/sprint support rather than climbing specialization.
vulnerability: Early-race crashes have disrupted team plans (Paris-Roubaix 2019), potentially exposing positional awareness issues in chaotic race starts.
key_patterns: Breakaway specialist for intermediate sprint point collection (Tour de France 2020)
Protects team leader Sagan's energy through domestique work across race types
Early-race positioning incidents impact team tactical execution (Paris-Roubaix crash)
form_trajectory: unknown: limited observations show consistent domestique role rather than personal results trajectory
